statement: Multiple internal repo helpers and at least one Lab endpoint are unused and can be removed without impacting current Lab UI flows.
rationale: Repo-wide searches show only definitions for several internal functions and `getWindowSummary` has no call sites.
keyAssumptions: No external tooling or scripts call these internal functions
validationCriteria: Call-graph search confirms no runtime references
Tests and Lab flows pass after removal
critiquePoints: Some functions may be used manually in dev or future branches
questions: Are any of these functions invoked by ops scripts or notebooks?
